## Tau Agent Handoff

- Result: `BLOCKED`
- Summary: Panel Creator initiated Scillm image generation inside Tau and failed closed before review.
- Next agent: `human`
- Executor: `human`
- Stop condition: Human supplies provider capacity or reruns with a working Scillm image auth mode.

    ],

      "visual_review_receipt": "/home/graham/workspace/experiments/tau/experiments/goal-locked-subagents/proofs/issue-31-streamed-image-blocker-20260629T170106Z/scillm-panel/visual_review_receipt.json"
    },

  },

    "goal_version": 1
  },
  "next_agent": {
    "executor": "human",
    "name": "human",
    "reason": "Human or operator must restore image provider capacity or switch image auth/provider."
  },
  "previous_subagent": "panel-creator",
  "rationale": "Reviewer cannot run until a generated panel image exists.",
  "required_evidence": [
    "A Scillm image generation receipt with ok=true, sha256, width, and height."
  ],
  "result": {
    "evidence": [
      "/home/graham/workspace/experiments/tau/experiments/goal-locked-subagents/proofs/issue-31-streamed-image-blocker-20260629T170106Z/command-loop/command-artifacts/command-loop-step-001/panel_creator_receipt.json",
      "/home/graham/workspace/experiments/tau/experiments/goal-locked-subagents/proofs/issue-31-streamed-image-blocker-20260629T170106Z/command-loop/command-artifacts/command-loop-step-001/scillm_image_generation_receipt.json"
    ],
    "status": "BLOCKED",
    "summary": "Panel Creator initiated Scillm image generation inside Tau and failed closed before review."
  },
  "schema": "tau.agent_handoff.v1",
  "stop_condition": "Human supplies provider capacity or reruns with a working Scillm image auth mode."
}
